sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, created_at) VALUES (1, 'test', now()), (2, 'NULL', now()), (3, '42', now()), (4, 'empty', now()), (5, 'MAX', now());
SELECT intHash32((SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table WHERE value != 'NULL')) AS max_id_hash FROM test_table;
SELECT intHash32(tuple((NULL), (value), (id))) AS tuple_hash FROM test_table GROUP BY value HAVING count(*) > 1;
SELECT value, intHash32(tuple(42, (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table))) AS hash_value FROM test_table GROUP BY value ORDER BY hash_value LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, intHash32(id) AS id_hash FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS recent_entries;
SELECT intHash32((id, value)) AS combined_hash FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value <> '') AS non_empty_values;
SELECT intHash32((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table)) AS count_hash FROM test_table;
SELECT intHash32((SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table)) AS max_value_hash WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) > 0;
SELECT id, intHash32(id * 100) AS scaled_hash FROM test_table WHERE id > (SELECT AVG(id) FROM test_table);
